mapper.select:
SELECT c.id, c.user_id, c.user_name, c.user_avatar, c.content, c.like_count as likes, c.reply_count, DATE_FORMAT(c.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as create_time,
EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM t_comment_like l WHERE l.comment_id = c.id AND l.user_id = #{userId}) as is_liked
FALSE as is_liked
FROM t_spot_comment c WHERE c.spot_id = #{spotId} AND c.parent_id IS NULL ORDER BY c.created_at DESC

SELECT c.id, c.user_id, c.user_name, c.user_avatar, c.content, c.like_count as likes, DATE_FORMAT(c.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as create_time,
EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM t_comment_like l WHERE l.comment_id = c.id AND l.user_id = #{userId}) as is_liked,
FALSE as is_liked,
p.user_name as reply_to FROM t_spot_comment c LEFT JOIN t_spot_comment p ON c.parent_id = p.id WHERE c.parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY c.created_at ASC
